'''SSA-719''' was a [[Baktoid Combat Automata/Legends|Baktoid Combat Automata]] [[OOM-series security droid/Legends|OOM security battle droid]] serving the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] during its [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]] in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]]. During the [[Naboo (people)/Legends|Naboo's]] bid to [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|take back]] the [[Planet/Legends|planetary]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of [[Theed/Legends|Theed]], SSA-719 was assigned to guard the entrance to the [[Theed Royal Palace/Legends|Theed Royal Palace]] throne room, where the [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droid]] was destroyed by a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] bolt to the head.

==Biography==
SSA-719 was an<ref name="CCG" /> [[OOM-series security droid/Legends|OOM security battle droid]]<ref name="TPM" /><ref name="NEGTD" /> manufactured by [[Baktoid Combat Automata/Legends|Baktoid Combat Automata]] for the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation's]] [[Trade Federation Droid Army/Legends|Droid Army]].<ref name="Databank" /> The [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droid]] had already entered service<ref name="TPM" /> by [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]],<ref name="NEC" /> when the Federation established a [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|blockade]] around the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] as an act of protest against the taxation of [[Hyperspace route/Legends|trade routes]] introduced by the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]]. After a failed negotiation attempt with two [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Ambassador/Legends|ambassadors]]—[[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]—the Federation forces landed on the planet and [[Capture of Theed/Legends|captured]] the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Theed/Legends|Theed]].<ref name="TPM" /> SSA-719 was then assigned to quell uprisings before they had a chance to gather momentum.<ref name="CCG" />

SSA-719 was standing guard at the entrance to the [[Theed Royal Palace/Legends|Theed Royal Palace]] throne room when [[Monarch of Naboo/Legends|Queen]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]], disguised as a simple [[Handmaiden/Legends|handmaiden]], was captured during the [[Naboo (people)/Legends|Naboo's]] attempt to [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|retake]] Theed from Trade Federation control. Amidala and her party were escorted into the throne room, where they were confronted by Federation [[Viceroy of the Trade Federation/Legends|Viceroy]] [[Nute Gunray/Legends|Nute Gunray]]. At that moment, Amidala's handmaiden [[Sabé/Legends|Sabé]], disguised as the [[Queen/Legends|queen]], approached and stated that the [[Viceroy/Legends|viceroy's]] occupation had ended. Believing her to be the true queen, Gunray ordered his [[Droid/Legends|troops]] to pursue Sabé. SSA-719 was destroyed by a well-aimed, decapitating [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] shot as Sabé and her group drew Gunray's troops away from the throne room, allowing Amidala to capture the viceroy and end the Trade Federation's occupation of Naboo.<ref name="TPM" />

==Characteristics==
SSA-719 had [[Gender/Legends|mascueline programming]]<ref name="Security Droid Gender" /> and [[Bone/Legends|bone]]-[[Color/Legends|white]] and red plating.<ref name="TPM" /><ref name="SWE" /> The droid used a standard [[E-5 blaster rifle/Legends|E-5 blaster rifle]],<ref name="CCG" /> and, like all B1 battle droids, stood 1.93 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] in height.<ref name="SWE" /> SSA-719 believed that the best form of defense was offense.<ref name="CCG" />

==Behind the scenes==
SSA-719 first appeared in [[George Lucas]]'s [[1999]] film, [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']]. Unnamed, the droid appeared briefly near the end of the film and was destroyed shortly thereafter.<ref name="TPM" /> The character was identified as SSA-719 in the [[2001]] ''[[Theed Palace Limited]]'' expansion set of the [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]].<ref name="CCG" />
